Off Calendar Aug-15-2006 Continued To Oct-03-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Robert Peterson III appearing for trustee. Jonathan Newman appearing for Moises Baltodano. Notice was not given to Renee. He is in court and he waives notice. Both counsel agree to be referred to mediation. Court is referring this matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed on or before 10/3. Matter is continued to 10/10 for status conference. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

MINI MINUTES: Robert Peterson III appearing for trustee. Jonathan Newman appearing for petitioner Moises Baltodano. Accounting was filed and hearing set on 8/1. Mr. Newman requests for a continuance to 8/1. Mr. Peterson agrees. Matter is continued to 8/1. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
